title: Senior Financial Analyst - Oriental Insurance - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Oriental Insurance - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Oriental Insurance in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Oriental Insurance:
Oriental Insurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oriental Insurance!
